jobs.requirements: Experience with cross-functional teams | Bachelor's degree or equivalent | 4+ years of relevant experience
jobs.responsibilities: Mentor junior team members | Design and implement key initiatives | Own deliverables end-to-end
jobs.benefits: Performance bonuses | Stock options / equity | Health, dental, and vision insurance | Parental leave | Flexible working hours
jobs.meta_description: Join our Sales team as a Senior Sales Executive in New York.

jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Build and maintain high-quality web applications using modern frontend technologies. Collaborate with designers and backend engineers to deliver great user experiences.
jobs.requirements: 3+ years React experience | Proficiency in TypeScript | Experience with REST APIs
jobs.responsibilities: Build reusable UI components | Optimize app performance | Write unit and integration tests
jobs.benefits: Remote-friendly | Stock options / equity | Health, dental, and vision insurance | Learning budget
jobs.meta_description: Join our Engineering team as a Frontend Engineer. Build modern web apps with React and TypeScript.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.description: Lead product strategy and roadmap for our core platform. Work closely with engineering, design, and business stakeholders to ship features that delight users.
jobs.requirements: 5+ years product management | Strong analytical skills | Experience in B2B SaaS
jobs.responsibilities: Define product vision and roadmap | Write detailed PRDs | Prioritize backlog with engineering
jobs.benefits: Equity package | Unlimited PTO | Health insurance | Annual retreat
jobs.meta_description: Join our Product team as a Product Manager in Austin. Lead strategy for our core platform.
